title: Balatonmáriafürdő

infobox.key: [MP](/wiki/List_of_members_of_the_National_Assembly_of_Hungary_(2018%E2%80%9322) "List of members of the National Assembly of Hungary (2018–22)")

infobox.value: * [Marcali](/wiki/Marcali "Marcali") (district seat) | [Coat of arms - Marcali](/wiki/File:HUN_Marcali_C%C3%ADmer.svg "Coat of arms - Marcali")
is a village located on the southern shore of [Lake Balaton](/wiki/Lake_Balaton "Lake Balaton") in [Somogy](/wiki/Somogy_County "Somogy County") county, [Hungary](/wiki/Hungary "Hungary").

**Balatonmáriafürdő** is a village located on the southern shore of [Lake Balaton](/wiki/Lake_Balaton "Lake Balaton") in [Somogy](/wiki/Somogy_County "Somogy County") county, [Hungary](/wiki/Hungary "Hungary").

## Public life

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Balatonm%C3%A1riaf%C3%BCrd%C5%91&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Public life")]

### Mayors

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Balatonm%C3%A1riaf%C3%BCrd%C5%91&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Mayors")]

* 1990-1994: László Szirják (Baráti Kör Egyesülete)[[2]](#cite_note-90önkvál-2)
* 1994-1998: László Szirják (független)[[3]](#cite_note-94önkvál-3)
* 1998-2002: László Szirják (független)[[4]](#cite_note-98önkvál-4)
* 2002-2006: Dr. Sándor Bollók (független)[[5]](#cite_note-02önkvál-5)
* 2006-2010: György Vince Galácz (független)[[6]](#cite_note-06önkvál-6)
* 2010-2014: György Vince Galácz (független)[[7]](#cite_note-10önkvál-7)
* 2014-2019: György Vince Galácz (független)[[8]](#cite_note-14önkvál-8)
* 2019-től: György Vince Galácz (független)[[9]](#cite_note-19önkvál-9)
